# Master PDF Hub - AI Friendly Information

## About
Master PDF Hub is a free online platform offering tools to convert, merge, compress, and edit PDFs and images. All processing happens locally in your browser—no files are uploaded to any server.

## Available Tools
- Text to PDF: `/text-to-pdf.html`
- Image to PDF: `/image-to-pdf.html`
- Merge PDF: `/merge-pdf.html`
- Compress PDF: `/compress-pdf.html`
- PDF Editor: `/pdf-editor.html`
- Image Compressor: `/image-compressor.html`
- JPG to PNG: `/jpg-to-png.html`
- PNG to JPG: `/png-to-jpg.html`

## Main Pages
- Home: `/`
- About: `/#about`
- Blog: `/#blog`
- Contact: `/#contact`
- Privacy: `/#privacy`

## Key Features
- 100% free, no registration
- No file uploads, 100% secure
- Works on desktop and mobile
- Fast processing in your browser
